zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Constable於1110年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾伯頓時，他的父親Albert Constable35歲，母親Ernaburga Burton30歲。他和Aubreye Lisours至少有4個兒子。他去世於1156年之後在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Constable was born in 1110, in Burton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Albert Constable, was 35 and his mother, Ernaburga Burton, was 30. He had at least 4 sons with Aubreye Lisours. He died after 1156, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Constableが1110年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルトンで生まれた時，父Albert Constableは35歳，母Ernaburga Burtonは30歳であった。彼はAubreye Lisoursとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1156年以後にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Constable(이)가 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert Constable(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Ernaburga Burton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Aubreye Lisours(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1156년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Constable родился в 1110 г. в местности буртон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Albert Constable было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ernaburga Burton, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Aubreye Lisours. Он умер после 1156 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
